dict.string: Search AWS profiles and open AssumeRole page

#!/bin/bash
query="${1}" config_file="${HOME}/.aws/config"
urlencode() { local string="$1" local encoded="" local length="${#string}" for (( i = 0; i < length; i++ )); do local c="${string:i:1}" case "$c" in [a-zA-Z0-9.~_-]) encoded+="$c" ;; @) encoded+="%40" ;; *) encoded+=$(printf '%%%02X' "'$c") ;; esac done printf '%s' "$encoded" }
items="" first=true current_profile="" current_role_arn="" current_login_session=""
process_profile() { local profile="$1" local role_arn="$2" local login_session="$3" local account_id iam_role
if [[ "$role_arn" =~ ^arn:aws:iam::([0-9]+):role/(.+)$ ]]; then account_id="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}" iam_role="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}" elif [[ "$login_session" =~ ^arn:aws:sts::([0-9]+):assumed-role/([^/]+)/ ]]; then account_id="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}" iam_role="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}" else return fi
[[ -z "$profile" ]] && return
if [[ -n "$query" ]]; then local profile_lower profile_lower=$(printf '%s' "$profile" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]') local query_lower query_lower=$(printf '%s' "$query" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]') [[ "$profile_lower" != *"$query_lower"* ]] && return fi
local encoded_role encoded_label color url item encoded_role=$(urlencode "$iam_role") encoded_label=$(urlencode "$profile") color=$(printf '%s' "$profile" | md5 | cut -c1-6) url="https://signin.aws.amazon.com/switchrole?account=${account_id}&roleName=${encoded_role}&displayName=${encoded_label}&color=${color}" item="{\"title\":\"${profile}\",\"subtitle\":\"${account_id} | ${iam_role}\",\"arg\":\"${url}\",\"autocomplete\":\"${profile}\"}" if $first; then items="$item" first=false else items="${items},${item}" fi }
if [[ ! -f "$config_file" ]]; then printf '{"items":[{"title":"~/.aws/config not found","subtitle":"Please configure your AWS credentials","valid":false}]}' exit 0 fi
while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do if [[ "$line" =~ ^\[profile[[:space:]]+([^]]+)\]$ ]]; then new_profile="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}" process_profile "$current_profile" "$current_role_arn" "$current_login_session" current_profile="$new_profile" current_role_arn="" current_login_session="" elif [[ -n "$current_profile" && "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]*role_arn[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*(.+)$ ]]; then current_role_arn="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}" elif [[ -n "$current_profile" && -z "$current_role_arn" && "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]*login_session[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*(.+)$ ]]; then current_login_session="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}" fi done < "$config_file"
process_profile "$current_profile" "$current_role_arn" "$current_login_session"
printf '{"items":[%s]}' "$items"
